verdict.answer_first: Tie: both answer in sentence 1 with the same concrete method; A says "The simplest way is a small `useDebounce` hook" and B says "The simplest approach is a custom hook".
verdict.decisiveness: A: it commits to the hook and keeps libraries secondary; B adds more option-shopping with "@mantine/hooks" and "use-debounce" plus a follow-up offer.
verdict.fabrication: B makes an unsupported preference claim: "300ms is a good default for search"; A has none beyond ordinary implementation guidance.
verdict.actionability: A: slightly easier to act on because it gives the hook, usage, and one restrained library note without extra branches.
